column1: # Knights of Camelot - lunar / calendar events
# Reference data for src/game.c::check_lunar_events. The cycle is 30 days
# (game_get_moon_day). Events fire at dawn on day_of_cycle and persist for
# `duration` days. Effects are dispatched in code by day number.

column6: Undead spawn rate increased; the night is darkest
Feast Day at Camelot - HP/MP restored
Merchants gather; bonus gold from trade
Food is plentiful; bread is gifted
